attributes.name: [Kafka OTel] High consumer lag per partition

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
// Per-partition consumer group lag (offset distance behind log-end)
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag)
  BY attributes.group, attributes.topic, attributes.partition
// Threshold: lag in messages. Adjust for your throughput (e.g. 10000, 100000)
| WHERE max_lag > 10000
| SORT max_lag DESC
